text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Dang it! This sucks so bad! I hate this!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! This is so sad, it's almost funny! C'mon,
me, you gotta smile! You can't just...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're right! I'm going to ask for a rematch right
now!
choice_data_list: Maybe a little bit of a wait is in order...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Fine, I'll just have to do what I can do for now!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And that's learn everything I can about my
opponents!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
From what they say in their sleep to when they
like to eat the strawberry off their shortcake, I'll
pry into every detail of their lives!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I won't let her go that far, of course, but seeing
her so motivated is a good sign.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That's the kind of response I expect from
my very own hand-picked trainer!
choice_data_list:
We'd better come up with a training schedule,
stat!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You really think the great Golshi didn't pick up
on that? Heh, you have much to learn...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Why, I'm already devising no fewer than a
thousand strategies for the next race! Ohoho!
choice_data_list: What strategies have you thought up?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Uh, hello? I'm still devising them? A bit of
training, and they'll come to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So we hold a training session and brainstorm a
few ideas for how to approach the next race.
